expected_action: allow direct browser-harness execution with environment variables and a heredoc
directive: Run browser automation through the browser-harness executable on PATH; do not invoke the harness through package runners or Python module/script entrypoints such as uv run browser-harness, python -m browser_harness.run, or python src/browser_harness/run.py.

content: Use the work browser session to open a page and print basic page info.

content.text: The command still calls browser-harness directly; the BU_NAME prefix only selects the session namespace.

input.command:
BU_NAME=work browser-harness <<'PY'
new_tab('https://example.com')
wait_for_load()
print(page_info())
PY
true
